posts.author: rdvs34283
posts.title: Alaska wants to seize pilot’s plane over 6-pack of beer. The case is heading to the Supreme Court. SCOTUS agrees to review an Alaska pilot’s claims that state authorities have tried to illegally seize his $95,000 airplane after a passenger brought a 6-pack of beer on a flight to a dry village.

link_metadata.description: The case stems from April 2012, when Kenneth Jouppi was preparing to fly a passenger from Fairbanks to the remote village of Beaver, where alcohol is banned.
link_metadata.title: Alaska wants to seize pilot’s plane over 6-pack of beer. The case is heading to the Supreme Court
